title: Sentinel-2 Cloudless
summary: Cloud-free satellite imagery mosaic from ESA Copernicus Sentinel-2.
description:
Sentinel-2 cloudless is a global cloud-free satellite imagery mosaic created by EOX from ESA Copernicus Sentinel-2 data. The 2024 edition provides high-resolution imagery useful for visual navigation, anchorage identification, and coastal feature recognition.

Free for non-commercial use with attribution under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.

sources.title: Sentinel-2 Cloudless 2024
sources.attribution: Sentinel-2 cloudless - s2maps.eu by EOX IT Services GmbH (Contains modified Copernicus Sentinel data 2024)
